feat.name: Takedown Expert
feat.text: You've mastered combat practices that let you get up close and bring down perpetrators alive. You can use your Intelligence modifier on attack rolls for an attack stratagem if you're using a weapon of the club group in one hand (like a club or staff), in addition to the usual weapons, and those Strikes qualify for your strategic strike. Additionally, you can make any of your Strikes nonlethal without taking the normal –2 penalty.

traits.name: Investigator
traits.text: This trait indicates abilities from the investigator class.
